profile.title: About Me
profile.headline: Hey there! I am Daniel Paiz, an early-career Software & Quality Assurance Engineer dedicated to writing highly performant, well-tested code.
profile.biography1: This application showcases stable integration practices leveraging modern Angular architectures, structured with strict separation of concerns for enterprise scaling.
profile.biography2: Included are various projects that I have created throughout my growth as a software engineer, this portfolio is a work in progress and will be updated with new projects and features as I continue to learn and grow in my career.

projects.title: E-Commerce System Integration
projects.description: Engineered automated end-to-end integration test suites utilizing modern testing frameworks to guarantee API schema compliance.

projects.title: Relational Database Analytics Console
projects.description: Designed a standalone analytical telemetry panel to securely manage transactional state queries across enterprise datasets.
